sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95272" key="skuqrwpasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκυθρωπ-ασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n95272.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sadness of countenance</tr_>, [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῶν φιλοσόφων</foreign>] <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.43f</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">378f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
